title: Diagnose browser 404 and misleading bootstrap fatal error
acceptance: Document that contentscript.js warnings are browser-extension noise, not app bugs
Bootstrap fatal error no longer mislabeled as missing env var
Favicon served to avoid /favicon.ico 404 once app is healthy
Operator knows root cause of index 404 is DB auth / app crash loop
root_cause: DATABASE_USER/PASSWORD in .env do not match host Postgres (user flow rejected); Traefik returns 404 while container restarts
